zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora de Astley於1300年之前出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Ralph Astley39歲，母親Mrs Rose Astley36歲。她和Piers de Montfort至少有2個兒子。她去世於1370年之後在英國瓦維其可爾，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾武倫哈爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lora de Astley于1300年之前出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Ralph Astley39岁，母亲Mrs Rose Astley36岁。她和Piers de Montfort至少有2个儿子。她去世于1370年之后在英国瓦維其可爾，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾武倫哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora de Astley was born before 1300, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Astley, was 39 and her mother, Mrs Rose Astley, was 36. She had at least 2 sons with Piers de Montfort. She died after 1370, in Warwickshire, England, and was buried in Ullenhall, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lora de Astley est née avant 1300, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Astley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs Rose Astley, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Piers de Montfort. Elle est décédée après 1370, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Ullenhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lora de Astley vor 1300 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Astley 39 und ihre Mutter Mrs Rose Astley 36. Sie hatte mit Piers de Montfort mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1370 in Warwickshire, England und wurde in Ullenhall, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Astley è nata il prima del 1300 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Astley, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mrs Rose Astley, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Piers de Montfort. Morì dopo il 1370, nel Warwickshire, England, e fu sepolta a Ullenhall, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Astleyが1300年以前にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Astleyは39歳，母Mrs Rose Astleyは36歳であった。彼女はPiers de Montfortとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1370年以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウレンハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Astley(이)가 1300년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Astley(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Rose Astley(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Piers de Montfort(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 이후 영국 워윅실르에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 울렌홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lora de Astley nasceu antes 1300, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Astley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Rose Astley, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Piers de Montfort. Ela faleceu após 1370, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Ullenhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lora de Astley родилась перед 1300 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Astley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Rose Astley, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Piers de Montfort. Она умерла после 1370 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности улленолл, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lora de Astley nació antes de 1300, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Astley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mrs Rose Astley, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Piers de Montfort. Murió después de 1370, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Ullenhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
